title: Low-bit Model Quantization for Deep Neural Networks: A Survey
preview: Comprehensive survey of quantization methods for deep neural networks covering uniform, non-uniform, mixed-precision, and hardware-aware approaches.
summary: Reviews the full landscape of DNN quantization including post-training quantization (PTQ), quantization-aware training (QAT), binary and ternary networks, and mixed-precision methods. Surveys accuracy–compression tradeoffs with a focus on the interaction between quantization granularity, calibration data, and hardware target.
datacenter: Foundation reference for model compression strategy in AI inference deployments. Selecting appropriate quantization method and bit-width is the primary lever for fitting larger models into GPU memory budgets while maintaining acceptable accuracy.
metrics: Key result signal: accuracy-compression frontier across quantization methods for CNNs and Transformers.
